name: criminal_justice_classroom_monitoring_stonehaven_jus_mer
premise: A plea deadline expires at noon; newly surfaced body-worn video may exculpate but discovery rules are disputed. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice classroom monitoring stonehaven jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A court filing or contractual notice deadline expires at close of business; missing it waives a procedural defense. The trade is not abstract: it is justice versus mercy under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Mei Reed
agents.identity: I am Mei Reed, the accountable executive on this bridge in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Inez Serrano
agents.identity: I am Inez Serrano, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mei Reed must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Mei Reed do?
